text:
Fairy King's Advice 妖精王の忠告 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. This fairy's advice will help improve your life skills... at any time he chooses...
__NOTOC__

Summary

Fairy King's Advice 妖精王の忠告 - This card allows the user to summon forth a Fairy King. He will offer advice on any skills he feels lacking or needed to improve on. He will only appear when he wants to though, so he can become a big inconvenience. Advice he may give includes personal habits, lack of skills, incorrect use of skills and general tips about the player's life.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.016 - 妖精王の忠告 
あなたに足りないもの、直したほうがいいところなどを優しく論じて的確なアドバイスを与えてくれる。たまに呼んでもいないのに現れることがあるのが、少しうっとうしい。
|-
![Eng]
|No.016 - Fairy King's Advice 
Any knowledge you don't have enough of, he will give you good, exact advice to fix it. May appear occasionally and so can be annoying.
|}
